name: Fabled Passage
oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice Fabled Passage: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control four or more lands, untap that land.
design_notes: A fetch land variant demonstrating complex land design: (1) sacrifice as an activation cost ({T}, Sacrifice ~:), (2) library searching with shuffle, (3) conditional bonus (four or more lands check) rewards late-game play, (4) empty color_identity because it can find any basic land. Fetch lands are inherently rare because they fix mana perfectly. The tapped clause with conditional untap is a power-level knob that makes this weaker than original fetchlands but still strong.
